title: PrimaGlobeMarket Scam Or Legit?
author: Ok-Patience1343
selftext: Hi, I was thinking about investing into some stuff online and 2 people told me about PrimaGlobeMarket ; [https://primaglobemarket.com](https://primaglobemarket.com) but after looking online about that website it looked very untrustworthy and most likely a scam.... So, I wanted to know from people who tried or knows about this website more than me to explain if it's a scam or something with proof or explanation of why or from past experiences with said Website.. Thanks In advance.
